prompt_preview:
Rank all active defender candidates and choose one final strategy. Prompt mode: compact.
Allowed defender IDs only: ["D4_isolate_edge2_vm_s4", "D3_isolate_edge2_gw_for_sen4", "D0_observe"]

Return exactly one compact JSON object with keys:
raw_text:
